title: Lenders can liquidate immediately because auctions have no maturity, delinquency, or health check
reason: `startLoanAuction` is intentionally permissioned to the lender on any active loan and the interface exposes no promised minimum term, delinquency threshold, or solvency invariant. In the code available here this is a protocol design choice, not a broken accounting, authorization, or collateral invariant.
